title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, predicted the intensity and track of Hurricane Melissa days in advance, enabling meteorologists and authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings. The model demonstrated high-confidence predictions for a Category 5 storm making landfall in Jamaica in October 2025.
